caption: The video features a presentation by Gene Bellinger, who is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main focus of the video is a complex diagram displayed on a computer screen, which appears to be a systems thinking model. The diagram consists of various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "learn modeling," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight dish," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, illustrating the relationships and flow between these concepts. The presentation seems to explore the interconnectedness of these ideas within a broader framework of trial and learning, possibly aiming to address societal issues through systems thinking and modeling.
